subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the signs of God! How blessed was thy destiny and how brilliant thy star, that thou didst attain unto the Most Exalted Lord, may my spirit be offered up for Him! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله چه قدر طالعت مبارک و اخترت روشن بود که برب اعلی روحی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
